title: The World-Tree Corpus
summary: The archive work shifts from thematic parallels to a proto-formal model of branching, resonance, and convergence.

narrative.newInfo: Myth records appear to preserve process rules, not only stories.
narrative.dripHook: Someone in the recent past likely recognized this same model.
narrative.notes: Cadence: second rise. Function: symbolic data -> structural theory. Exit: search target becomes person-level, not concept-level.

rewardTokens.description: Corpus shifts from symbolic motif to structural hypothesis.
Search orientation turns toward prior human discoverers.
